creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
At Fri, 10 Nov 2000 05:10:03 -0800 (PST),
MIHIRA Sanpei Yoshiro wrote:
>  net/vnc was committed by "Bruce A. Mah" <bmah@FreeBSD.org>.  But
>  ``NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES=YES'' was still in Makefile.

>I commited mail/youbin.

Thanks, it was most complex port with this PR. :-)

NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES is harmless and useless with "correctly fixed"
USE_IMAKE ports. It does nothing. This means NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES can
be retired when this PR would be successfully closed.

Could you please take a look into more 33 unfixed ports?

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
